Functions for compositor animations, Bluetooth events, stubs, JSON config, and system app state machine.


## Files
- **[shell.c](shell.c.md)**: Functions for retrieving compositor animations for app transitions.
- **[shell_event_loop.c](shell_event_loop.c.md)**: Manages Bluetooth pairing events and reconnection logic in the Pebble firmware shell event loop.
- **[stubs.c](stubs.c.md)**: Stubs for unimplemented functions in the PRF system of the Pebble firmware.
- **[system_app_registry_list.json](system_app_registry_list.json.md)**: JSON configuration for system and resource applications in Pebble firmware with usage instructions.
- **[system_app_state_machine.c](system_app_state_machine.c.md)**: Implements a state machine for managing system app states, including panic and manufacturing modes.
